title: README manual synthnote operator spine quickstart
problem: Tickets 088–093 proved the manual synthnote pipeline in code. Operators need a documented CLI sequence (ingest through detect-contradictions) referencing fixture map behavior and the gitignored operator source path.
acceptance_criteria: README documents the manual synthnote operator spine with python -m rge.cli commands and expected outcomes.
No production code or golden test changes.
non_goals: No live Ollama, export, schema migration, or new CLI commands.
